message:
test(pt-config,pt-core): expand no-mock coverage for policy and calibrate bias

policy.rs: 2→45 tests (defaults, loss(), is_protected, PatternKind, FdrMethod, ConfidenceLevel, sub-struct serde)
bias.rs: 3→18 tests (empty/single/balanced, over/underconfident, stratification, recommendations, significance, serde)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
